headline: GameStop CEO Silent on Mega-Deal as It Crushes Earnings, Stockpiles Cash
summary: GameStop (NYSE: GME) filed its Q4 FY2025 results on March 24, 2026, delivering a massive earnings beat while quietly building the financial foundation that makes a major acquisition credible. The question investors are asking is whether the balance sheet now supports CEO Ryan Cohen’s rumored pursuit of a major acquisition, expected to be eBay (NASDAQ: ... GameStop CEO Silent on Mega-Deal as It Crushes Earnings, Stockpiles Cash
